heading: Definitions
label: 5901 Definitions
notes: Delayed Effective Date of SectionFor delayed effective date of section, see Effective Date note below.

children.heading: Appropriate Federal banking agency
children.label: 1 Appropriate Federal banking agency
children.text: The term “appropriate Federal banking agency” has the meaning given that term in .section 1813 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: ;section 1829b of this title

children.label: B
children.text: chapter 2 of title I of ( et seq.); andPublic Law 91–50812 U.S.C. 1951

children.label: C
children.text: subchapter II of chapter 53 of title 31.

children.heading: Board
children.label: 3 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.

children.heading: Comptroller
children.label: 4 Comptroller
children.text: The term “Comptroller” means the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency.

children.heading: Corporation
children.label: 5 Corporation
children.text: The term “Corporation” means the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.

children.heading: Digital asset
children.label: 6 Digital asset
children.text: The term “digital asset” means any digital representation of value that is recorded on a cryptographically secured distributed ledger.

children.label: i
children.text: exchanging digital assets for monetary value;

children.label: ii
children.text: exchanging digital assets for other digital assets;

children.label: iii
children.text: transferring digital assets to a third party;

children.label: iv
children.text: acting as a digital asset custodian; or

children.label: v
children.text: participating in financial services relating to digital asset issuance; and

children.label: i
children.text: a distributed ledger protocol;

children.label: ii
children.text: developing, operating, or engaging in the business of developing distributed ledger protocols or self-custodial software interfaces;

children.label: iii
children.text: an immutable and self-custodial software interface;

children.label: iv
children.text: developing, operating, or engaging in the business of validating transactions or operating a distributed ledger; or

children.label: v
children.text: participating in a liquidity pool or other similar mechanism for the provisioning of liquidity for peer-to-peer transactions.

children.heading: Distributed ledger
children.label: 8 Distributed ledger
children.text: The term “distributed ledger” means technology in which data is shared across a network that creates a public digital ledger of verified transactions or information among network participants and cryptography is used to link the data to maintain the integrity of the public ledger and execute other functions.

children.heading: Distributed ledger protocol
children.label: 9 Distributed ledger protocol
children.text: The term “distributed ledger protocol” means publicly available and accessible executable software deployed to a distributed ledger, including smart contracts or networks of smart contracts.

children.heading: Federal branch
children.label: 10 Federal branch
children.text: The term “Federal branch” has the meaning given that term in .section 1813 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a nonbank entity, other than a State qualified payment stablecoin issuer, approved by the Comptroller, pursuant to , to issue payment stablecoins;section 5904 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: that is chartered by the Comptroller, pursuant to title LXII of the Revised Statutes; and

children.label: ii
children.text: that is approved by the Comptroller, pursuant to , to issue payment stablecoins; andsection 5904 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: a Federal branch that is approved by the Comptroller, pursuant to , to issue payment stablecoins.section 5904 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: organized under the laws of or domiciled in a foreign country, a territory of the United States, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, or the Virgin Islands; and

children.label: B
children.text: not a permitted payment stablecoin issuer.

children.heading: Institution-affiliated party
children.label: 13 Institution-affiliated party
children.text: With respect to a permitted payment stablecoin issuer, the term “institution-affiliated party” means any director, officer, employee, or controlling stockholder of the permitted payment stablecoin issuer.

children.heading: Insured credit union
children.label: 14 Insured credit union
children.text: The term “insured credit union” has the meaning given that term in .section 1752 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: an insured depository institution, as defined in ; andsection 1813 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: an insured credit union.

children.label: A
children.text: requires a person to seize, freeze, burn, or prevent the transfer of payment stablecoins issued by the person;

children.label: B
children.text: specifies the payment stablecoins or accounts subject to blocking with reasonable particularity; and

children.label: C
children.text: is subject to judicial or administrative review or appeal as provided by law.

children.heading: Monetary value
children.label: 17 Monetary value
children.text: The term “monetary value” means a national currency or deposit (as defined in ) denominated in a national currency.section 1813 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: means a medium of exchange currently authorized or adopted by a domestic or foreign government; and

children.label: B
children.text: includes a monetary unit of account established by an intergovernmental organization or by agreement between 2 or more countries.

children.label: A
children.text: A Federal Reserve note (as the term is used in ).section 411 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Money standing to the credit of an account with a Federal Reserve Bank.

children.label: C
children.text: Money issued by a foreign central bank.

children.label: D
children.text: Money issued by an intergovernmental organization pursuant to an agreement by 2 or more governments.

children.heading: Nonbank entity
children.label: 20 Nonbank entity
children.text: The term “nonbank entity” means a person that is not a depository institution or subsidiary of a depository institution.

children.heading: Offer
children.label: 21 Offer
children.text: The term “offer” means to make available for purchase, sale, or exchange.

children.label: i
children.text: that is, or is designed to be, used as a means of payment or settlement; and

children.label: I
children.text: is obligated to convert, redeem, or repurchase for a fixed amount of monetary value, not including a digital asset denominated in a fixed amount of monetary value; and

children.label: II
children.text: represents that such issuer will maintain, or create the reasonable expectation that it will maintain, a stable value relative to the value of a fixed amount of monetary value; and

children.label: i
children.text: is a national currency;

children.label: ii
children.text: is a deposit (as defined in ), including a deposit recorded using distributed ledger technology; orsection 1813 of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: is a security, as defined in , , or , except that, for the avoidance of doubt, no bond, note, evidence of indebtedness, or investment contract that was issued by a permitted payment stablecoin issuer shall qualify as a security solely by virtue of its satisfying the conditions described in subparagraph (A), consistent with section 17 of this Act.section 77b of title 15section 78c of title 15section 80a–2 of title 15

children.label: A
children.text: a subsidiary of an insured depository institution that has been approved to issue payment stablecoins under ;section 5904 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a Federal qualified payment stablecoin issuer; or

children.label: C
children.text: a State qualified payment stablecoin issuer.

children.heading: Person
children.label: 24 Person
children.text: The term “person” means an individual, partnership, company, corporation, association, trust, estate, cooperative organization, or other business entity, incorporated or unincorporated.

children.label: A
children.text: with respect to a subsidiary of an insured depository institution (other than an insured credit union), the appropriate Federal banking agency of such insured depository institution;

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to an insured credit union or a subsidiary of an insured credit union, the National Credit Union Administration;

children.label: C
children.text: with respect to a State chartered depository institution not specified under subparagraph (A), the Corporation, the Comptroller, or the Board; and

children.label: D
children.text: with respect to a Federal qualified payment stablecoin issuer, the Comptroller.

children.heading: Registered public accounting firm
children.label: 26 Registered public accounting firm
children.text: The term “registered public accounting firm” has the meaning given that term under .section 7201 of title 15

children.label: i
children.text: the Secretary of the Treasury shall serve as Chair; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the Chair of the Board (or the Vice Chair for Supervision, as delegated by the Chair of the Board), and the Chair of the Corporation shall serve as members; and

children.label: B
children.text: which, unless otherwise specified in this chapter, shall act by ⅔ vote of its members at any meeting called by the Chair or by unanimous written consent.

children.heading: State
children.label: 28 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the several States of the United States, the District of Columbia, and each territory of the United States.

children.heading: State chartered depository institution
children.label: 29 State chartered depository institution
children.text: The term “State chartered depository institution” has the meaning given the term “State depository institution” in .section 1813(c) of this title

children.heading: State payment stablecoin regulator
children.label: 30 State payment stablecoin regulator
children.text: The term “State payment stablecoin regulator” means a State agency that has primary regulatory and supervisory authority in such State over entities that issue payment stablecoins.

children.label: A
children.text: is legally established under the laws of a State and approved to issue payment stablecoins by a State payment stablecoin regulator; and

children.label: B
children.text: is not an uninsured national bank chartered by the Comptroller pursuant to title LXII of the Revised Statutes, a Federal branch, an insured depository institution, or a subsidiary of such national bank, Federal branch, or insured depository institution.

children.heading: Subsidiary
children.label: 32 Subsidiary
children.text: The term “subsidiary” has the meaning given that term in .section 1813 of this title

children.heading: Subsidiary of an insured credit union
children.label: 33 Subsidiary of an insured credit union
A
children.text: an organization providing services to the insured credit union that are associated with the routine operations of credit unions, as described in ;section 1757(7)(I) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a credit union service organization, as such term is used under part 712 of title 12, Code of Federal Regulations, with respect to which the insured credit union has an ownership interest or to which the insured credit union has extended a loan; and

children.label: C
children.text: a subsidiary of a State chartered insured credit union authorized under State law.
